genre_refs: Arnold Friberg, 'The Prayer at Valley Forge' (George Washington praying)
description: Designed graphic built on a reproduction of Arnold Friberg's painting 'The Prayer at Valley Forge'. The oil illustration shows a man in Revolutionary War dress (red-lined dark cloak, buff breeches, boots, sword) kneeling with head bowed and hands clasped in a snowy winter forest beside a light-colored saddled horse, with sunset light on the snow. Overlaid across the bottom in an ornate white blackletter serif font is the text 'One Nation Under God'. No DOL seal is visible.
